component.name: Mainline Kernel Installer
component.summary: Install Ubuntu mainline kernels with a verified initramfs

description.p: Browse, download, and install Ubuntu mainline kernels from kernel.ubuntu.com. The kernel version is read from package metadata rather than parsed from filenames, the initramfs is generated and verified to exist before an install reports success, and every installed kernel is health-checked for a missing initrd so an unbootable kernel is visible before a reboot instead of after.
